message:
feat: extension scaffolding with GSettings schema and constants

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+{
+    "uuid": "mutter-butter@mutter-butter.github.io",
+    "name": "Mutter Butter",
+    "description": "Grid-based window management with live-scaling postage stamps",
+    "shell-version": ["50"],
+    "version": 1,
+    "url": "",
+    "settings-schema": "org.gnome.shell.extensions.mutter-butter"
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,69 @@
+<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
+<schemalist>
+  <schema id="org.gnome.shell.extensions.mutter-butter"
+          path="/org/gnome/shell/extensions/mutter-butter/">
+    <key name="focus-rank-threshold" type="i">
+      <default>3</default>
+      <summary>Focus rank threshold</summary>
+      <description>Number of top-ranked windows that stay full size</description>
+      <range min="1" max="20"/>
+    </key>
+    <key name="placement-mode" type="s">
+      <default>'in-place'</default>
+      <summary>Stamp placement mode</summary>
+      <description>How stamps are positioned: in-place, shelf, or pack</description>
+    </key>
+    <key name="shelf-edge" type="s">
+      <default>'bottom'</default>
+      <summary>Shelf edge</summary>
+      <description>Edge for shelf placement mode</description>
+    </key>
+    <key name="shelf-max-depth" type="i">
+      <default>2</default>
+      <summary>Maximum shelf depth</summary>
+      <description>Maximum shelf rows/columns before falling back to in-place</description>
+      <range min="1" max="4"/>
+    </key>
+    <key name="exempt-apps" type="as">
+      <default>[]</default>
+      <summary>Exempt applications</summary>
+      <description>App IDs exempt from auto-shrink</description>
+    </key>
+    <key name="zoom-in-keybind" type="as">
+      <default>['<Super>KP_Add']</default>
+      <summary>Zoom in keybind</summary>
+      <description>Keybinding to zoom in (increase scale)</description>
+    </key>
+    <key name="zoom-out-keybind" type="as">
+      <default>['<Super>KP_Subtract']</default>
+      <summary>Zoom out keybind</summary>
+      <description>Keybinding to zoom out (decrease scale)</description>
+    </key>
+    <key name="hysteresis-ms" type="i">
+      <default>2000</default>
+      <summary>Hysteresis cooldown</summary>
+      <description>Milliseconds before a just-shrunk window can be indirectly restored</description>
+      <range min="0" max="10000"/>
+    </key>
+    <key name="monitor-connectors" type="as">
+      <default>[]</default>
+      <summary>Monitor connectors</summary>
+      <description>Connector names of connected monitors, written by extension</description>
+    </key>
+  </schema>
+  <schema id="org.gnome.shell.extensions.mutter-butter.monitor"
+          gettext-domain="mutter-butter">
+    <key name="grid-columns" type="i">
+      <default>8</default>
+      <summary>Grid columns</summary>
+      <description>Number of grid columns for this monitor</description>
+      <range min="4" max="32"/>
+    </key>
+    <key name="grid-rows" type="i">
+      <default>6</default>
+      <summary>Grid rows</summary>
+      <description>Number of grid rows for this monitor</description>
+      <range min="3" max="24"/>
+    </key>
+  </schema>
+</schemalist>
